# Boise

> Geotechnical engineering company in United States, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Active Passive Anchor Design](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/active-passive-anchor-design/)
- [Atterberg Limits](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/atterberg-limits/)
- [Base Isolation Seismic Design](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/base-isolation-seismic-design/)
- [Bearing Capacity Analysis](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/bearing-capacity-analysis/)
- [Collapsible Soil Evaluation](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/collapsible-soil-evaluation/)
- [Cone Penetration](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/cone-penetration/)
- [Debris Flow Analysis](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/debris-flow-analysis/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Direct Shear](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/direct-shear/)
- [Driven Pile Design](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/driven-pile-design/)
- [Dynamic Compaction Design](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/dynamic-compaction-design/)

- [Existing Pavement Evaluation](https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/existing-pavement-evaluation/)

- Website: https://boise.geotechnicalengineering.sbs/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in United States.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
